name: Kog Hill Winery
tagline: Small-batch, artisan wines from Pennsylvania fruit — Morgantown, PA.
seoDescription: Kog Hill Winery in Morgantown, PA — 25+ small-batch artisan wines from Pennsylvania-grown fruit, from Cabernet Franc to Toasted Marshmallow. Open Fri–Sun.

hero.heading: Twenty-five wines, made in small batches.
hero.subheading: An artisan Pennsylvania winery in Morgantown, crafting everything from classic Cabernet Franc to a Toasted Marshmallow you have to taste to believe — all from locally grown fruit.

images.heroAlt: Kog Hill Winery in Morgantown, PA

about.heading: Artisan wines since 2002
body: Kog Hill was founded in 2002 on a simple idea: make genuinely good wine from Pennsylvania-grown fruit. Two decades on, that principle still guides every small, hand-crafted batch that leaves the cellar.

In 2022, Julie and Bob took the reins and kept the artisan spirit going — today the list runs more than twenty-five wines deep, side by side with the classics: Cabernet Franc and Grüner Veltliner next to playful pours like Toasted Marshmallow and Pumpkin Spice. There's something here for the purist and the curious alike.

services.title: Small-batch wines
services.description: More than 25 artisan wines, made in small lots from Pennsylvania-grown fruit.

services.title: Classic varietals
services.description: Cabernet Franc, Grüner Veltliner, and other dry standards for the traditionalist.

services.title: Specialty pours
services.description: Toasted Marshmallow, Pumpkin Spice, and other seasonal favorites that keep things fun.

services.title: Tastings
services.description: Weekend tastings where you can work through the list and find your bottle.

sections.heading: Twenty-five wines, two ways
sections.intro: The classics for the purist, and a few playful pours for the curious.

items.a: Friday through Sunday, 12–5. Closed Monday through Thursday.

Yes — come work your way through the list and find your bottle.
